titleStmt.title: SII 5.976: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 976. (A.R. No. 113 of 1896). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvaḷar tiraḷpuyat tirunila valaiya nta ṉ maṇippūṇeṉa tā
ṅki paṉmaṇikkoṟṟa veṇkuṭainiḻal kuvalaiyat tuyirkaḷaip
peṟṟa tāyilum peṇa maṟṟuḷ Aṟaikaḻa laraicar tanṉaṭi niḻa lo
tuṅka Uṟaipilattuṭai kali yotuṅka muṟaimaiyi larumpeṟal ta
maiyaṉai Āḷavantā ṉai Irumpuvi pukaḻirājādhirāja nen ṟoḷimaṇi mu
ṭi cūṭṭi tan ṟirupputalvaṉākiya maturān=ta kaṉai vāḷen tu tānai coḷe
n=ti raṉnen ṟeṇṭicai nikaḻa veḻil muṭi cūṭṭit toṇṭaimaṇṭa
laṅ kuṭuttaruḷi tiṇṭiṟal maiyṉta(ṉ)nākiya kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉai
Eḻuyariyāṉai coḻapāṇṭiyaneṉ ṟiṇṭuyar maṇimuṭi Icaipeṟac cūṭṭi
pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷi Āṇṭakai vaṭikoṇṭa katirvel muṭikoṇ
ṭacoḻaṉai [cun=ta] racoḻaneṉ cuṭarmuṭi cūṭṭi Anta mil peruñciṟap paruḷi taṉ ki
ḷai Evverulakattava ralarkkuriya vakaliṭam veṟuve ṟaruḷi Ikalmuṉai viruto
ṭu malaikkum vikkalaṉ taṉnoṭu varicilait taṭakkai mācāman=ta rai kaṅkapāṭi kaḷa
ttiṭainiṉṟum tuṅkapattirai pukat turatti Āṅka
var veṅkainaṉṉāṭṭiṭai miṭṭumavar viṭṭa tāṅkarum
peruvalit taṇṭu keṭat tākki mātaṇṭanāyakaṉ
cāmuṇṭarājaṉaic ceṟṟu vaṉcirattiṉai Aṟuttu ma
ṟṟavaṉ Oru makaḷākiya Irukayan=te vi nākalai yeṉṉum tokai
yañcāyalai mukattoṭu mukku veṟākki pakait tetir munṟām vicaiyilum E
nṟetirporutu paripavam tirvateṉak karuti porupuṉal kūṭal caṅka[mat tāha]
vamallaṉ makkaḷākiya vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇaṉ(ṉ) neṉṟivar tammoṭu Eṇṇilicā
man=ta rai veṉṟaṭu tūci muṉviṭṭu tanṟuṇai maṉnaru ntā num pinṟit tirun tu vaṭa
kaṭa(l)leṉa vakutta vattāṉaiyai kaṭaṟkaḷi ṟonṟiṉāl kalakki Aṭalpurai ko
calai ciṅkaṉai koṭippaṭai muṉnar tūciveṅkaḷiṟṟoṭu n tuṇittu kecavatta
ṇṭanāyakan ṟāṟ keṟṟaracan tiṇṭiṟal māraiyan tiṟala pottaracan nereccayan Ikal
ceya peṟtokai muvettiveṉṟārt taṭu tuppil laneka cāman=ta raip piṉnaāpinna
ñ ceytu piṉnai mutaliyāṉa matuvaṇaṉ Oṭa viritta talaiyoṭu vikkala(n) noṭa ceru
ttoḻi(l) laḻin tu ciṅkaṇaṉ noṭa Aṇṇalan mutalina ranaivarum Amarporp paṇ
ṇiṉa pakaṭiḻi n=to ṭa naṇṇiya Āhavamallanu(m) mavarkku muṉ noṭat tan vekaveṅ
kaḷiṟṟi[ nai vi] lakki vākaikoṇ ṭaṅkavar tāramum Avar kulatanamuñ caṅkun toṅka
lum tāraiyum periyum mekaṭampamum veṇcāmaraiyuñ cūkarakkoṭiyum makaratoraṇa
mum Oṭṭaka niraikaḷum Olokācanamum puṣpa kap piṭiyum porukaḷiṟ ṟīṭṭamum pāyparit tu
kaiyoṭum paṟittu ceyyoḷi vicaiyamaṇimakuṭam Icaiyoṭuñ cūṭṭi ticaitoṟuñ ce
ṅkol celutti yacaivinṟi viratinikkoṭi tiyākakkoṭiyoṭum Eṟpavar varukenṟu ni
ṟppa kottoḻi(l)lurimaiyi(l) leyti yaraicu viṟṟirun tu mevarum manuneṟiviḷakkiya
kovirāja kesarivarmmarā na Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājendrade varkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nā
ḷ ḷirunūṟṟu muppattu muṉṟināl rājādhi rājavaḷanāṭṭu nāṅkūrnāṭṭu nāṅkūr tiruve
ṇkāṭuṭaiyār tevatāṉa(m)māna Iṉnāṭṭu kalaiyamaṅkalamum tirunāḻalvāyilum nāṅ
kūrkaḷum tukkaḷākkuṭiyum miykuṟumpilum Accaṅkuṟukkāṭum tirupputtūrum Ayirāṇa
maṅkalamum Erumalabrahmade yamum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanallūrum kirankuṭiyum tirukkaḻu
malanāṭṭu Iḷamaṅkalamum tiruvālināṭṭu ciṟukiḻāyppālum Āka Ivvūrkaḷāl van=ta
Ūrkkaḻañcuṅ kumarakkaccāṇamum minpāṭṭamum Āṟṟuppāṭṭamum taṭṭārppāṭṭam muḷ
ḷiṭṭa kiḻiṟaippāṭṭamum taṟippuṭavaiyum tacavan=ta mum velikkācum cevakakkācum vala
ṅkai Iṭaṅkai makanmaiyum tiṅkaḷmokamum Ivvūrkaḷ ḷiṭakkaṭava panmaiyā
lum paṇṭaveṭṭiyālum Āḷ ḷonṟukku kācu pattāka van=ta kācum virarājendrade
var piṟan=ta ruḷiṉa Āyileyat tirunāḷkaḷāl tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār tiṅkaḷto
ṟum tirumañcaṉa māṭiyaruḷit tiruviḻā Eḻun=ta ruḷukaikkum peruntiruvamirtu ce
ytaruḷukaikkum veṇṭum nivan=ta ṅkaḷuk kiṟuppatāka yāṇ ṭiraṇṭāvatin neti
rāmāṇṭumuta liṟaiyiliyāka variyilliṭukeḻvippaṭi kal veṭṭivittān
puravuvaritaṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇakku ciṟṟuṟaiyūr kiḻavan tāmotiran karumāṇikkam .
Digital edition of SII 5.976 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
